attacking_style: Wins from small breakaway groups (6 riders), showing strong finishing ability when given freedom. At 19, demonstrated exceptional sprint timing against experienced breakaway specialists.
team_tactics: GAZPROM commits significant numbers to breakaways (3 riders in 6-man group), creating numerical advantage to control and deliver Vachek to the finish.
terrain_preference: Breakaway-friendly stages where peloton miscalculates chase effort. Thrives when team can establish numerical superiority in reduced groups.
vulnerability: Insufficient data from single race observation. Likely exposed in pure bunch sprints against dedicated sprinters or when isolated without numerical advantage.
key_patterns: Team commits multiple riders (3/6) to establish numerical control in breakaways
Shows finishing speed superior to breakaway specialists despite youth and relative inexperience
form_trajectory: unknown: only single race observation from early 2022 available, insufficient data to assess trajectory
